truth.narrative: Accelerating cold front under pilot time pressure, central Kansas. A March cold front sweeps ESE across the route; it starts at 15 kt, accelerates to 22 then 28 kt, and intensifies from moderate to strong by 1600Z. Pre-frontal convection appears 60 nm ahead of the boundary at 1500Z. The TAF issued before the window forecasts the front at its slower initial speed, so the actual METARs show the front arriving earlier than predicted.
